notes: Asserts only the visible state arc around context compaction: ready→working→ready for the first turn, then /compress (gemini's command, NOT /compact) settles back to ready, then a second normal turn (ready→working→ready) proves the session continues. Recorded with the INTERACTIVE gemini-cli driver (gemini -y under tmux): send + wait_turn + sleep, /compress as a slash step, then a second send + wait_turn. Compaction is IN-PLACE for gemini — it rewrites in-memory history (setHistory) then re-syncs the SAME session-*.jsonl via a $set rewrite (updateMessagesFromHistory); there is NO new transcript file at the boundary (unlike newer Claude Code 2.1.x+), so no session-stitching risk applies. The compaction event itself is recorded as a UI item type:'compression' which the parser's default branch skips; irrlicht cannot distinguish compaction from a normal long working-turn (CompactionState is dead code), so only the state arc is asserted. The /compress invocation arrives as a user-role text message → user_message → working; the summarizer's LLM call settles via the inferred text-only turn_done → ready. compact_window asserts the post-compaction settle to ready and that state never sticks in waiting (it MAY briefly enter working during the summarizer call — only the settle is asserted). observations.model (gemini-3.5-flash) is the live-recorded default boot model on the API-key tier (record settled it from the provisional gemini-3-flash-preview).

text: Session appears in ready shortly after launch
Launcher PID bound by cwd shortly after launch
First user prompt populates context: ready → working
First turn completes back to ready (final text-only 'gemini' message, no tool calls)

After /compress runs, the session settles back to ready (gemini compacts in-place, rewriting the same JSONL). State must not stick in waiting. The state may briefly enter working during the summarizer call — only the post-compaction settle to ready is asserted here.
Post-compaction user prompt drives ready → working — proves the session continues normally after /compress
Post-compaction turn completes back to ready
